title: Modded Mizuno - Supplementaries
description: A resource pack for the mod Supplementaries and the add-on mods squared and amendments in the style of Mizuno 16x
body:
Part of a larger project I'm working on to bring my love for the Mizuno resource pack to different mods. This project focuses on Supplementaries and it's sub-projects.

It's highly recommended to use this resourcepack in combination with Mizuno 16x
